data.title: Argentina approves USD 2.7 billion investment for Los Azules mining project under RIGI, boosting economy.
data.description: Argentina has approved a $2.7 billion investment for the advancement of Los Azules, a prominent mining project in the country.

data.title: Jefferies Financial (JEF) Q3 earnings out soon, analysts predict EPS of 80 cents (up from 75 cents) & revenue of $1.92 billion (up from $1.68 billion). Strategic alliance announced with Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc (SMFG).
data.description: Jefferies Financial Group Inc. (NYSE: JEF) is scheduled to announce its third quarter earnings after the market closes on Monday, Sept. 29. Analysts predict the New York-based company will report earnings of 80 cents per share, an increase from 75 cents per share in the same period last year. Jefferies Financial is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.92 billion, compared to $1.68 billion from the previous year. The company recently expanded its global strategic alliance with Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. (NYSE: SMFG), Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, and SMBC Nikko Securities Inc. For more information, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nasdaq gains 100 points; US consumer sentiment falls to 55.1 in September. Energy shares up 1.4% while tech drops 0.4%.
data.description: US stocks saw positive trading on Friday, with Nasdaq Composite gaining around 100 points. The Dow rose 0.83% to 46,328.48, Nasdaq up 0.45% to 22,484.92, and S&P 500 increased by 0.62% to 6,645.73. Energy shares surged by 1.4%, while information technology stocks fell by 0.4%. University of Michigan consumer sentiment was revised to 55.1 from 55.4 in September. MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) shares jumped 106% to $2.9791 after announcing expansion plans in Japan. BioAffinity Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: BIAF) also saw a surge. More details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trade finance firm provides credit facility to bubble tea trader in Europe. Celebrating its 25th anniversary, Tradewind Finance supports Baltics trader with working capital.
data.description: In Mönchengladbach, Germany, as of September 26, 2025, Tradewind Finance, a global trade finance company marking its 25th year, has supplied working capital for a Baltic-based bubble tea global trader. This export financing is aiding the trader in expanding their operations.

data.title: Trump threatens 100% tariffs on pharmaceutical companies, impacting industry.
data.description: This week, President Donald Trump has intensified pressures on the pharmaceutical industry by issuing a new threat of imposing 100% tariffs on certain companies. This development has brought back the focus on the issue of pharmaceutical tariffs.

data.title: HNI Corp to acquire Steelcase, Inc. in cash & stock deal, expecting $5.7B in net sales. Acquisition to close Q4 2025.
data.description: In Muscatine, Iowa on September 26, 2025, it was announced that HNI Corporation (NYSE: HNI) has entered a definitive agreement to acquire Steelcase, Inc. (NYSE: SCS) through a cash and stock transaction. The Acquisition is aimed at combining the companies' brand portfolios, dealer networks, and industry segments to expand customer outreach and drive long-term growth. The pro forma net sales for the combined entity for the year ended December 28, 2024, were around $5.7 billion. The target timeline for the Acquisition to conclude is the fourth quarter of 2025, pending standard closing conditions. The deal does not hinge on the Exchange Offer or Consent Solicitation completion or financing conditions.

data.title: AppLovin stock receives price-target hikes from two analysts as it trades at record levels on Wall Street.
data.description: On Friday, two Wall Street analysts raised their price targets for AppLovin stock, which is currently trading at all-time highs. This positive news has led to increased investor interest in the company. The stock has been receiving a lot of attention and is now at record levels.

data.title: Stock market hit record highs with Nvidia-OpenAI deal, but fell back due to extended stocks and Micron earnings.
data.description: After reaching record highs following a major deal between Nvidia and OpenAI, the stock market experienced a retreat, particularly affecting overextended stocks. The decline was exacerbated by disappointing Micron earnings. Despite the initial surge, the market was unable to sustain its peak levels. This fluctuation was highlighted in the recent weekly review, signaling a mixed performance in the market following these significant developments.

data.title: Ford Motor's stock rises, earns upgrade to Relative Strength Rating of 71 by IBD amid strong price performance.
data.description: Ford Motor is experiencing a positive trend in its pricing performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 71. This news highlights the increasing strength of Ford Motor stock in the market.

data.title: Charles Schwab stock sees Relative Strength Rating surge to 81, highlighting technical strength and positive performance.
data.description: Investor's Business Daily reports an increase in the Relative Strength Rating for Charles Schwab, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. The stock now boasts a strong Relative Strength Rating of 81, reflecting improved market momentum. This upgrade underscores the company's growing strength in the stock market, showcasing its potential for strong returns and investor interest.

data.title: Celebree School opens in Wayne, PA, offering curriculum-based programs for children 6 weeks to 5 years old.
data.description: Families in the local area are welcome to attend the grand opening event on September 29th in WAYNE, Pa., for an opportunity to discover curriculum-based programs tailored for children aged six weeks to five years. Celebree School, renowned for its excellence in early childhood education services including infant and toddler care, as well as preschool programs, will be hosting the event. The initiative aims to introduce parents to the educational offerings available for their young ones.

data.title: SJE Inc. marks one year since acquiring Revere Control Systems, leading to accelerated growth and expanded capabilities.
data.description: A global leader in control solutions, SJE, Inc., based in Detroit Lakes, Minnesota, marked one year since acquiring Revere Control Systems, which has led to accelerated growth and enhanced capabilities. This acquisition has significantly boosted SJE's offerings and reach in the industry. The celebration on September 26, 2025, highlighted the success of the merger and its positive impact. SJE continues to expand its services and now possesses increased expertise in control solutions as a result of this move. The collaboration has proven fruitful, with notable growth in both companies' operations over the past year.

data.title: Price predictions for 9/26: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Ripple, Binance Coin, Solana, Dogecoin, Cardano, Hyperlink, Avalanche may see resistance after recovery attempts.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin and other major alternative cryptocurrencies is currently attempting to bounce back, although they are expected to face substantial resistance if they reach higher price points.

data.title: Tennessee duo fined $6.8M for scam promising crypto guidance from "Coach Wendy"; scam exposed.
data.description: Investors were informed by the couple that a supposed investment advisor named "Coach Wendy" would provide guidance on cryptocurrency trades. However, the platform turned out to be fraudulent, and the identity of the advisor remains a mystery.

data.title: Global Membrane Bioreactor market to grow from $4.4B in 2025 to $9.4B by 2030, at 16.1% CAGR. Factors include water scarcity, quality issues, and sustainability.
data.description: The latest study from BCC Research predicts that the global Membrane Bioreactor (MBR) market will grow from $4.4 billion in 2025 to $9.4 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 16.1% during this period. The report segments the market based on microbial processes, membrane types, configurations, membrane materials, and end users. It is relevant due to the increasing need for sustainable wastewater treatment technologies, driven by factors like water scarcity, water quality issues, decline in freshwater resources, strict effluent discharge standards, focus on sustainability, and demand for decentralized treatment. Industries and municipalities are turning to MBRs as a reliable solution meeting environmental standards while improving treatment performance. This report provides valuable insights for stakeholders to identify opportunities and make informed decisions in the evolving MBR landscape.
